response_characteristics.personalization: low — asks for more context at the end
response_characteristics.actionability: medium-high — provides concrete steps but generic
response_characteristics.specificity: low — no knowledge of what course was taken

observations: Lacks emotional depth beyond one congratulatory sentence
Asks clarifying question at the end rather than upfront
Provides a broad menu of options without prioritizing any
Does not probe what 'learning a ton' means to the user
No attempt to understand the user's goals or context before advising
